title: Sweetbusters
intro: Right, Sweetbusters. Rockbusters, but UK sweets again.
prize: Email in. Winner gets The Best of The Corrs on MiniDisc.

clues.clue: Right, that bit in your mouth where the teeth sort of live, it's been on the red and white booze. What's happened there?
Little newborns, right, but they're all wobbly. You wouldn't put one in a pram.
The organ that pumps blood has gone all romantic and that. Bit soppy.

title: Citybusters
intro: Right, Citybusters. Rockbusters but it's all European cities this week.
prize: Email in your answers. Winner gets a Now That's What I Call Music 52 on cassette.

clues.clue: Right, a bloke called Gary has gone and done a runner from a French bloke called Pierre. What's he done there?
The Pope's having a bit of a wander round his back garden. Bit chilly for it.
Right, a bloke's gone and put a lot of vines on his instrument but he's not bothered about it. What's that all about?

title: Filmbusters
intro: Right, Filmbusters. Same as Rockbusters but it's famous films.
prize: Email your answers in. Winner gets a signed photo of someone off Hollyoaks.

clues.clue: Right, a mechanic's gone and rubbed the car down so it'll take the new paint. What's happened there then?
This bloke from ancient Greece has gone and found a wooden horse on his doorstep. He's not best pleased.
Right, some fella's gone and had his lower half eaten off by something in the water. Probably shouldn't have gone swimming there.
